Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 855Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 29

entry.title: ✶⋆.˚𝐓𝐡𝐞 𝐀𝐮𝐝𝐚𝐜𝐢𝐭𝐲 𝐨𝐟 𝐓𝐡𝐢𝐬 𝐁𝐢𝐭𝐜𝐡 .✦ ݁˖
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,158Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 12

Summary: Some mid-level corporate schmuck at a gala decides to mock Bruce Wayne’s breakup with Selina Kyle and imply Bruce is desperate for attention. The next morning, the entire Wayne Enterprises lobby gets a front-row seat to the consequences. Bruce is trying very, very hard not to laugh. He is failing. (or: How the Batfamily Avenged Bruce Wayne’s Dignity, One Pair of Pants at a Time)

entry.title: 𝙸𝚗 𝙷𝚊𝚕𝚏 𝚊 𝙷𝚎𝚊𝚛𝚝𝚋𝚎𝚊𝚝
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,131Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 49

Summary: Zatanna needs human blood to seal a containment circle. The only available blade is cursed: a willing donor must spill their own blood, or the spell fails. Bruce doesn't hesitate. The Batfamily watches him slit his wrist in the time it takes Dick to draw breath.

entry.title: Batman And Harley Quinn Under The Red Hood.
entry.summary:
Author: Jakebob555

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,436Chapters: 9/20Kudos: 6

Summary: One year post the Funeral of Jason Todd Bruce Wayne and Harleen Quinzel's friendship is going strong. With the former Clown Princess of Crime now out of Arkham and attempting to return to Civilian Life. Elsewhere Tim Drake continues training under Bruce to take on the mantle of Robin, things take a dark turn though when a new foe taking up the name and mantle of the Red Hood appears on the streets of Gotham hunting down members of the Joker's gang as well as the local Drug Trade. Who is this mysterious new Vigilante and why does he seem to know Batman?

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: Kitten: Year 16, Meeting the Batfamily
entry.summary:
Author: Dominant_Abomination

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,342Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 62

Summary: Izakk is the Son of Catwoman and Batman. He's been staying out of Batman's sight for sixteen years, not wanting to end up how being a sidekick of Batman usually does. He's happy and content staying by his Mama's side as Kitten, her thieving sidekick. What happens when he's discovered soon after his sixteenth birthday? He knows one thing, he's NOT putting on fucking boy shorts.

entry.title: drowning on dry land
entry.summary:
Author: moon_will_sing

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,512Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 50

Summary: He itched to follow his son upstairs, make sure he was alright, but he also knew that he couldn’t just yet. Dick had asked for space and even if, in Bruce’s opinion, that might not be what he needed right now, what he did need was Bruce respecting his boundaries, so that was what he would do. The other very good reason for staying downstairs was the rest of his children gathered in the entryway of the house; looking lost, bruised and exhausted to the bone. Not to mention, absolutely soaked. The thunder and heavy raindrops hitting the rooftop could still be heard from outside. “Alright, status report.“   Or: Stranded in an old safehouse during a storm, Bruce is dead-set on making sure all of his kids are alright. No one is alone tonight.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The family you find with tinted glasses
entry.summary:
Author: Eclipse_mSoul5647

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,704Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 32

Summary: Bruce didn't know how by just by being kind he caught the Bat's attention. Not only were they the Mafia family that ruled in night and the light, but they were also now his adopted children. But really, who was actually doing the adopting. Bruce or his kids? Or Mafia! Yandere Batfamily & Doctor! Bruce Wayne

entry.title: ࿔˚𓇢𓆸✺𝑻𝒉𝒆 𝑮𝒖𝒂𝒓𝒅𝒊𝒂𝒏'𝒔 𝑴𝒆𝒓𝒄𝒚✺⚘.⋆˚࿔
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,656Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: The Batfamily encounters a runaway teenager who refuses all help until Bruce makes one call. His godmother arrives, wearing a black mask with painted closed eyes and a V-smile. No one can see her face. No one can see where she's looking. The Batfamily must read her through voice and body language alone and for Cassandra Cain, who reads everything through eyes and micro-expressions, she's a nightmare to understand.

entry.title: Another Perspective
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 96,914Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 559

Summary: A clash of opposing plans causes Batman to accidentally be doused with a hybrid of not-quite-Fear Toxin and Ivy's pheromones. In order to cope with the opposing influences, his brain convinces him that the four Rogues who were keyed to them - Scarecrow, Ivy, Harley Quinn, and Riddler - have been deaged into children. Obviously he'll have to bring them home and look after them until an antidote is made. Meanwhile, by order of the Batkids in order to NOT break Batman's mind, said Rogues are forced to play along.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: (‧₊˚ ♡⋅𝕋𝕙𝕖 𝔹𝕒𝕥𝕔𝕒𝕧𝕖'𝕤 𝔹𝕖𝕤𝕥-𝕂𝕖𝕡𝕥 𝕊𝕖𝕔𝕣𝕖𝕥𓂃 ࣪ ִֶָ☾.)ᶻ 𝗓 𐰁
entry.summary:
Author: StarEater_04

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,467Chapters: 5/5Kudos: 15

Summary: When a late-night patrol ends early due to a Gotham blizzard, the Batfamily discovers Bruce Wayne, the stoic, brooding, emotionally constipated Batman, in a homemade blanket fort, hugging an arm-length pillow, wrapped in two very specific blankets, with the heater running. And he's been doing this since high school. Chaos ensues.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: I have emotional motion sickness
entry.summary:
Author: filmdarling1304

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 12,962Chapters: 3/4Kudos: 170

Summary: Why is Clark out to get him? Hasn’t he been a good boyfriend? Hasn’t he? Maybe he hasn’t, maybe he’s so sick in the brain that even Clark can sense it. Maybe by fattening him up, he would get back at Bruce for clearly ruining his life. Maybe- “Bruce? Breakfast is ready.” Clark’s grating voice was outside the bathroom door.   Unknown to anybody, Bruce had been struggling with food for nearly two decades.Unknown to anybody, Bruce stopped taking his medication.What follows is a man who couldn't stop himself from falling into a hole of intense disordered eating, paranoia, and unhealthy coping mechanisms that could cost him his life.That is, if the ones who love him don't stop him first.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: one time, when it all goes wrong
entry.summary:
Author: Zuribat026

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 109,878Chapters: 18/?Kudos: 61

Summary: Beatrice is trying, all things considered. her family feels like it's breaking apart. Clark won't speak to her right now. and things keep happening around her.she needs to help everyone around her, the same way they need to help her.before they can't anymore.   i don't own any of the characters and i don't give permission for AI to use my work

entry.title: Chapter 4; Dark Age
entry.summary:
Author: Corvix_Ailuranthrope_4313

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,210Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: Point Break, the meteor that had hit the Planet Earth, had almost destroyed the world in its entirety, there was chaos everywhere now, no law, no order, monsters had ruled the streets with no fear of the dark, and this Batman was on his own with nothing but his wits and willpower, would he survive in this chaos and help Gotham rebuild? Or will Gotham finally fall once and for all this time around?
